recommendations:
Jack Stanley

I could basically not recommend Matthew any higher as a manager, strategy lead, and team lead. He is always level headed and cool under pressure, and has that knack of providing thoughtful ideas and strategies which also contain surprise and intrigue. As a manager and team lead, Matthew is a fantastic guiding presence, but also is able to be hands off enough to ensure your own thoughts and worldviews come through in the work you produce. He's a superb mentor.He 'gets' social more than most, and is able to guide clients through that minefield which occurs in such a rapidly changing landscape.Best of all, he's not only excellent at giving advice one-way, but is a great listener too, and actively seeks views and opinions from his colleagues of all levels.

Benedita Leitão

During my time working with Matt, it became clear that Matt is not only a great strategist but also a great leader. Matts fascination with strategy and genuine curiosity are contagious. Even during busy periods, Matt will spend as much time as is needed discussing strategy, making sure the final result is the best it can be. As a leader, Matts positive attitude is inspiring. He takes pride in championing the potential of each member of his team and is not afraid to get his hands dirty.I was lucky to have worked alongside Matt on the I Belong Here campaign for Coca-Cola & IOC, where besides building an award-winning strategy, Matt made sure I was learning with him at every step of the way, expertly giving me the space I needed to build up my confidence as a strategist. A true mentor. Anyone would be lucky to be part of Matts team.
